con:config.script: for(i=0;i<5;i++){ def tc1= testRunner.testCase.testSteps["randomStrings"] tc1.run(testRunner, context) def tc2= testRunner.testCase.testSteps["randomStringsCode"] tc2.run(testRunner, context) def tc3= testRunner.testCase.testSteps["franchiseID"] tc3.run(testRunner, context) def tc4= testRunner.testCase.testSteps["dateFrom"] tc4.run(testRunner, context) def tc5 = testRunner.testCase.testSteps["CreateCostCenter"] tc5.run(testRunner, context) Thread.sleep(2000); } testRunner.gotoStepByName('cc_walletIDs')

/* import org.apache.commons.lang.RandomStringUtils charset = (('a'..'z') + ('A'..'Z') + ('0'..'9')).join() length = 9 RandomStringUtils.random(length, charset.toCharArray()) */
def textNum = Math.abs(new Random().nextInt() % 99999) + 1 return textNum

con:config.con:query: select id, name, code from retail.cost_center where franchise_id='${franchiseID#Result}' and deleted = 'false'
